composition.important_crop_information: right edge of truck cropped, passenger side (right) mirror and part of right cab not visible; complete lower cab, grille, bumper and left mirror are visible

company_identity.position: above windshield, centered, on a white panel
company_identity.appearance: blue horizontal text with red 'HZ' logo left of text

roof_lights.position: roof, evenly spaced along the front edge

main_headlights.position: front corners, integrated into lower part of cab

windshield_contents: Green emission sticker on lower left (from viewer perspective)
Small purple square on lower left (from viewer perspective)

front_geometry.grille_description: Four horizontal large black bars with mesh, uppermost bar includes Scania badge; overall grille is tall and fills majority of the front
front_geometry.headlight_description: Rectangular, with clear lens and multiple horizontal elements stacked inside each unit, one on each front corner
front_geometry.bumper_description: Blue, integrated, with black accents and a green round sticker with 'L' on right (viewer's right), license plate in center
